name: seo-article-audit
description: Diagnose why an AIHR article lost organic traffic, decide whether SEO salvage is viable, then execute confirmed strategies as compact click-focused article changes. Reads the article, checks Outline history, pulls worldwide and US-only GSC data plus Ahrefs keyword facts, runs Chrome-based factual SERP observation, recommends strategy before optimization, and bundles seo-strategy-execution for recommendations, rewrite risk assessment, draft edits, and article-diff-md red/green diff views.
